name: create, read, and delete a note

Editor should contain entered note body text before save getByTestId('editor-container').locator('.tiptap')
Accessibility scan: Editor View
Accessibility scan on "Editor View" should have no violations

steps.name: Read button should be enabled after saving the note getByTestId('editor-container').getByRole('button', { name: 'Read' })
Reading view heading should be visible after switching to read mode getByRole('heading', { name: 'Reading' })
Reading view should display the saved note body text locator('.note-content')
Top note card title should match the created note title getByTestId('note-card').first().getByRole('heading', { level: 2 })
Top note card body should match the created note body text getByTestId('note-card').first().locator('p').first()
Top note card date should match today's date getByTestId('note-card').first().locator('p').nth(1)
Accessibility scan on "Read View" should have no violations
Delete confirmation dialog should be visible after clicking delete getByRole('alertdialog', { name: 'Delete Note' })
Accessibility scan on "Delete Dialog" should have no violations
Empty state text should be visible after deleting the note getByText('Choose a note from the list or create a new one to start writing.')
Deleted note was found when not expected getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Created by Playwright 1784196058621-5611e7' }).first()
